<

Element performance

A data module containing performance data

Element title

title

Element perfoContent

performance data content

Element subLevel

performance data content in a sub level

Element subLevel

performance data content in a sub level

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element title

title of sub level

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element figure

container for the graphical reference and information.

Element graphic

contains the external reference to the illustration file

Element hotspot

contains the definition of graphical regions in an illustration and contains information needed to navigate between graphical objects or between graphical objects and text

Element legend

contains the legend

Element symbol

contains illustrations and graphics that are intended to be presented inline within the normal text.

Element displayInstructions

Provides some display instruction for a target display device/format

Element linktext

Text where the hyperlink is formatted for

Element title

Title or name of the graphic

Element graphic

reference to an external illustration file. Possible 3 graphics for 3 layers of the same graphic.

Application Data

The maxOccurs of 3 means there may be three graphics for three layers of the graphical information, not three completely different illustrations. The third illustration provides the most detailed one.

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute targetName

Name of a devices, electronic consultation tools or publication format

Attribute anchorMode

Default anchor mode for a graphic

Attribute displayMode

Describes the location where a graphical object is presented on a display screen

Attribute spread

Indicates if the graphic is spread on the whole screen

Attribute zoomMode

Provides the percentage of zoom

Attribute rotation

Indicates if the graphic must be rotated and the rotation direction (clockwise or anticlockwise)

Attribute gColor

Indicates if the graphic must be rendered in color.

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute infoIdent

The population of this attribute must include the complete ICN with the prefix "ICN-"

Attribute mimeType

provide the MIME type of the graphic object in compliance with the standard - IANA Media Types

Simple Type idType

A unique identifier

Simple Type layerType

Layer of information details

Simple Type priorityLevelType

Level of priority for an electronic message or a annunciationr

Simple Type messageCategoryType

Type of the message (such Alert, Memo, Message)

Attribute logicalOperator

specifies the logical operation to perform on the results of all child elements

Attribute logicalOperator

specifies the logical operation to perform on the results of all child elements

Attribute logicalOperator

specifies the logical operation (AND or OR) to perform on the results of all child elements

Attribute extensionProducer

the graphic/multimediaObject/symbol producer the value of which forms part of the universally unique identifier of a graphic/multimediaObject/symbol instance

Attribute extensionCode

the graphic/multimediaObject/symbol extended code the value of which is decided by the graphic/multimediaObject/symbol producer.

Element internalRef

Used to mark up a cross-reference from one point in a data module to another point in the same data module

Element dmRef

References to data modules

Element dmRefIdent

Contains the items forming a unique identification of the destination data module

Element behavior

Specifies how the link operates, when a reference is supposed to be realized as a link.

Attribute referredFragment

contains the identification of an exact target within a data module when a reference addresses a specific location within another data module rather than the whole data module. The target must be an element in the destination data module and the target identification is the id attribute of the target element.

Attribute internalRefId

The target id

Attribute internalRefTargetType

Used indicate the type of destination of the reference.

Attribute targetTitle

Used to provide a human-readable label for the link destination, which could be presented after the target identifier or be displayed when for instance the cursor is hovering over the target identifier

Attribute linkShow

specifies the link appearance.

Attribute linkActuate

specifies the link behavior

Element externalRef

External reference to a non-Spec2300 data fragment.

Attribute productRefOwner

product owner in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute productRefModel

product model attribute in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute productRefSerial

product serial number attribute in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute productRefName

product name in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute productRefNbr

product number in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute productRefDataFormat

data format of the product in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute productRefDataSpec

product name in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute targetRefId

ID in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute targetRefTitle

Title in which the external reference is targeted

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element dmIdent

unique identification of the data module

Element identExtension

producer unique subdomain for instance identification

Element dmCode

data module code

Element language

describe the language in which the data module is written

Attribute dispatchItemExtensionCode

optional extension for dispatch item code : XXX-XXXX-XXX

Attribute extensionProducer

the data/publication module producer the value of which forms part of the universally unique identifier of a data/publication module instance

Attribute extensionCode

the data/publication module extended code the value of which is decided by the data/publication module producer.

Attribute modelIdentCode

the model identifier using NSPA Model Identification Code list

Attribute systemDiffCode

indicates alternative versions of the system and subsystem/ by the SNS without affecting the type, model or variant identity. SDC can also be used to differentiate DMs which pertain to the same subject but for different equipment variations installed on the aircraft.

Attribute systemCode

the system code (part of the SNS).

Attribute subSystemCode

the subsystem code (part of the SNS).

Attribute subSubSystemCode

the sub-subsystem code (part of the SNS).

Attribute assyCode

the assembly code (part of the SNS).

Attribute disassyCode

the disassembly code.

Attribute disassyCodeVariant

the disassembly code variant, used for container (value Z) and alternates identification

Attribute infoCode

the information code

Attribute infoCodeVariant

the information code variant

Attribute itemLocationCode

the item location code, can be used to flag a training DM (value T). Default value is A.

Attribute learnCode

the learn code allowing to flag a training DM, as T01 (flight training mission), T02 (simulator), T03 (on ground training mission), T04 (operational training)

Attribute learnEventCode

the learn event code

Attribute languageIsoCode

two alpha characters from International Standards Organisation (ISO) 639

Attribute countryIsoCode

two alpha characters from ISO 3166 to denote the country where the language is spoken

Attribute rowHeader

Tag the entry content as part of the "row header".

Attribute bgColor

table cell background color. Use of CSS3 color specification notations.

Element invalidConfig

Empty element allowing to tag in a table cell (perfo tables or regular tables) that this is an invalid/impossible value.

Element multimedia

container for multimedia data

Element multimediaObject

contains the external reference to the multimedia file

Element parameter

parameters of an multimedia object

Element alternative

alternative content in environment without support of multimedia format

Element title

Title or name of the multimedia object

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute infoIdent

The population of this attribute must include the complete ICN with the prefix "ICN-"

Attribute mimeType

provide the MIME type of the multimedia object in compliance with the standard - IANA Media Types

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Element extApplication

allow to launch an application from an active content

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Element para

General purpose container for textual information and structured data.

Element table

A markup representation of a table as standardized in the CALS (Continuous Acquisition and Life-Cycle Support, previously known as Computer-aided Acquisition and Logistic Support) initiative.

Element pairedItem

A Pair allowing bi-column association optionally with a separator character-

Element pairedItem

A Pair allowing bi-column association optionally with a separator character-

Element case

A part of content under a condition

Element exclusiveCases

Two or more exclusive conditional descriptive content

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Element para

General purpose container for textual information and structured data.

Element table

A markup representation of a table as standardized in the CALS (Continuous Acquisition and Life-Cycle Support, previously known as Computer-aided Acquisition and Logistic Support) initiative.

Element pairedItem

A Pair allowing bi-column association optionally with a separator character-

Element example

A bloc of content marked as an example

Element abbreviation

A shortened form of a word or phrase.

Element techLabel

A technical label.

Element emphasis

Part of text to emphasize

Element ifInstalled

Flag an optional equipment

Element ifOperated

Flag an operated equipment

Element ifOperative

Flag an operative equipment

Element measureBlock

pair of measures to provide the same business measure for two different measurement systems.

Element measure

A measure: with a specific unit : contains a decimal and has a unit attribute (such as meter, inch, kg, ....).

Element equation

A mathematical equation

Element electronicMessage

An electronic message

Element electronicMessageBlock

A grouping of electronic messages

Element message

Electronic message content

Element subMessage

Sub messages displayed

Attribute direct

Used to write a condition on a single line.

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element caseCond

A condition

Element caseCond

A condition statement

Element caseCond

A condition statement

Element caseCondBlock

A block of condition statements

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Element case

A part of content under a condition

Element exclusiveCases

Two or more exclusive conditional descriptive content

Element title

optional title for the example

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element warning

Call attention to the use of materials, processes, methods, procedures, or limits, which must be followed precisely to avoid injury to persons.

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element caution

Call attention to the use of materials, processes, methods, procedures, or limits, which must be followed precisely to avoid damage to equipment.

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element note

Descriptive information used to provide recommendations or additional information, but not directly required for the accomplishment of a procedure.

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element seqList

A set of items of text in which the sequence of the items listed is significant.

Element randList

A set of items of text in which the sequence of the items listed is not significant.

Element listTitle

A description of the purpose of a list. Normally only used to differentiate between consecutive repetitions of a list structure unseparated by a higher level list item.

Element para

General purpose container for textual information and structured data.

Element listItem

A set of elements that describe the names, words or other items transmitted as part of a list.

Attribute listStyle

describe list formats (bullet style for randList or numbering style for seqList)

Attribute associationType

allows to specify if this is an inclusive or exclusive list

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element leftPart

The left part of a paired item

Element rightPart

The right part of a paired item

Attribute sepchar

separator character

Attribute width

position of the separator character : is a percent of global width

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Element limit

limitation (perfValue or literal) optionally followed by a comment. Used if the operation of the airplane is restricted.

Element perform

Listing of performance decrements (list, table, statements, graphics, etc.). Used if the airplane’s baseline performance is affected

Element perfValue

limitation composed of a couple perf-value

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element perf

Performance parameter related to a performance limitation.

Element value

Value of the performance limitation.

Attribute id

Optional id for data management

Attribute layer

Layer of information

Element perfoData

Performance tables

Element table

A performance table

Element title

title or name of the performance table

Element tgroup

Performance table

Element ftnote

container for the footer information of the perfor table

Element colspec

specification for a table column

Element spanspec

specification for the horizontal span of the table column

Element thead

container of all heading rows within a table group (tgroup)

Element tfoot

container of all footer rows within a table group (tgroup)

Element tbody

container of all table body rows within a table group (tgroup)

Element colspec

specification for a table column

Element row

container for a performance table row

Element colspec

specification for a table column

Element row

container for a performance table row

Element row

container for a performance table row

Element entry

container for a performance table cell : depending of the part of the table (conditions, inputs, outputs, split definitions, correction frame), the content model of the entry is different

Element rowValue

Value of the row parameter of the Performance table Body.

Element perfoOutput

A performance table output

Element entry

cell of the thead part of performance tables

Element valueLegend

Description of the parameters that are stored in each of the Performance table Body cells.

Element colTitle

Name of the column parameter of the Performance table Body.

Element rowTitle

Name of the row parameter of the Performance table Body.

Element colValue

Value of the column parameter of the Performance table Body.

Element para

a paragraphe giving more general explanations

Element entry

cell of the tfoot part of performance tables

Element splitDefinition

Significance of a split area applied to the Performance table body.

Element correctionType

Names of the influence parameters and names of the corrected parameters in the Correction section of the Performance table.

Element correctionValue

Values associated to the influence parameters and corrected parameters in the Correction section of the Performance table.

Element para

a paragraphe giving more general explanations

Element commonCondition

Values of paramaters that apply to the whole Performance table Body.

Attribute splitArea

used to define the split area of an output cell in the performance table

Element digitalPerformanceInfo

provided information of a digital performance software

Element perfoSoftwareRef

Performance software reference, such as serial number

Element perfoSoftwareVersion

Performance software version

Element perfoDatabaseVersion

Performance database version

Element modelIdent

Identification info about the model

Attribute majorModelCode

Primary designator for an aircraft program

Attribute minorModelCode

Secondary designator for aircraft program

Attribute modelDesignation

Main program designation for an aircraft model

Attribute modelMarketDesignator

Specify market types (civil, military, business) for an aircraft model

ATA Spec 2300 — Performances

Schema Document Properties

Target Namespace
http://www.ataebiz.org/XMLSchema
Element and Attribute Namespaces
  • Global element and attribute declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
  • By default, local element declarations belong to this schema's target namespace.
  • By default, local attribute declarations have no namespace.
Schema Composition
  • This schema imports schema(s) from the following namespace(s):
    • http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML (at ../mathML/mathml3.xsd)
  • This schema includes components from the following schema document(s), where some of the components have been redefined:
    • ../common/dataManagement/dmodule.xsd
    • ./coreTable.xsd
    See Redefined Schema Components section.
Documentation

Table schema specialization for ATA FOIG table that has been redefined and extended from the ATA CALS Core Table schema.

This Schema file contains definitions for Warning, Caution and Note elements.

Version Number: 2017.1

Revision Comments: Spec 2300 revision 2017.1

Declared Namespaces:

Prefix
Namespace
Default namespace
http://www.ataebiz.org/XMLSchema
xml
http://www.w3.org/XML/1998/namespace
m
http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML
xs
http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:schema targetNamespace="http://www.ataebiz.org/XMLSchema" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified">
   <xs:redefine schemaLocation="../common/dataManagement/dmodule.xsd">
      <xs:complexType name="contentElemType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="contentElemType">
               <xs:sequence>
                  <xs:element ref="performance"/>
               </xs:sequence>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
   </xs:redefine>
   <xs:redefine schemaLocation="./coreTable.xsd">
<--=====================================================--><--Table Title Content model--><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="tblTitleType" mixed="true">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="tblTitleType">
               <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
                  <xs:group ref="basicMixedContentGroup"/>
               </xs:choice>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
<--=====================================================--><--  Redefine table element definition --><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="tableType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="tableType">
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="fomlTableAttGrp"/>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
<--=====================================================--><-- table content group--><--=====================================================-->      <xs:group name="tableCoreContentGroup">
         <xs:choice>
            <xs:group ref="tableCoreContentGroup"/>
            <xs:element ref="figure" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
         </xs:choice>
      </xs:group>
<--=====================================================--><-- Redefine tgroup element definition --><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="tgroupType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="tgroupType">
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="fomlTgroupAttGrp"/>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
<--=====================================================--><-- Redefine thead element definition --><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="theadType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="theadType">
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
<--=====================================================--><-- Redefine tfoot element definition --><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="tfootType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="tfootType">
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
<--=====================================================--><--  Redefine tbody element definition --><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="tbodyType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="tbodyType">
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
<--=====================================================--><-- Redefine row element definition --><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="rowType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="rowType">
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="valignAttGrp"/>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
<--=====================================================--><-- Redefine entry Content--><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="entryType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="entryType">
               <xs:choice>
                  <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
                     <xs:group ref="shortTextGroupType"/>
                     <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
                     <xs:element ref="figure"/>
                     <xs:element ref="multimedia"/>
                     <xs:element ref="extApplication"/>
                     <xs:group ref="entryExtensionGroup"/>
                  </xs:choice>
                  <xs:element ref="invalidConfig"/>
               </xs:choice>
               <xs:attribute name="rowHeader" type="xs:boolean" use="optional"/>
               <xs:attribute name="bgColor" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
<--=====================================================--><-- Redefine table-footnote Content--><--=====================================================-->      <xs:complexType name="ftnoteType">
         <xs:complexContent>
            <xs:extension base="ftnoteType">
               <xs:choice>
                  <xs:group ref="textGroupType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
               </xs:choice>
               <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
            </xs:extension>
         </xs:complexContent>
      </xs:complexType>
   </xs:redefine>
   <xs:import namespace="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" schemaLocation="../mathML/mathml3.xsd"/>
...
</xs:schema>

Redefined Schema Components

Complex Type: contentElemType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
contentElemType < contentElemType (by extension)

XML Instance Representation 

<...>
   <performance> ... </performance> [1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="contentElemType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="contentElemType">
         <xs:sequence>
            <xs:element ref="performance"/>
         </xs:sequence>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: tblTitleType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
tblTitleType < tblTitleType (by extension)
Used By
title
Documentation
redefine the table title to match FOIG title/name structure

XML Instance Representation 

<...>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
         <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
         <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
         <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
         <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
         <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
         <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
         <measure> ... </measure> [1]
         <equation> ... </equation> [1]
         <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
         <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
         <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="tblTitleType" mixed="true">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="tblTitleType">
         <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
            <xs:group ref="basicMixedContentGroup"/>
         </xs:choice>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: tableType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
tableType < tableType (by extension)
Used By
table, table, table
Documentation
main FOIG table container extended from ATA CALS core table

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1]
 tablewidth="xs:string" [0..1]
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="tableType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="tableType">
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="fomlTableAttGrp"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Model Group: tableCoreContentGroup

Documentation
basic table content group being extended to include FOIG figure

XML Instance Representation 

Start Choice [1]
   Circular model group reference: tableCoreContentGroup [1]
   <figure> ... </figure> [1..*]
End Choice

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:group name="tableCoreContentGroup">
   <xs:choice>
      <xs:group ref="tableCoreContentGroup"/>
      <xs:element ref="figure" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
   </xs:choice>
</xs:group>

Complex Type: tgroupType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
tgroupType < tgroupType (by extension)
Documentation
CALS table grouping container of header, body and footer - extended to include FOIG attributes.

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1]
 tabstyle="xs:NMTOKEN" [0..1]
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="tgroupType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="tgroupType">
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="fomlTgroupAttGrp"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: theadType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
theadType < theadType (by extension)
Documentation
container of all heading rows within a table group (tgroup) - extended to include FOIG attributes

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1]
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="theadType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="theadType">
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: tfootType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
tfootType < tfootType (by extension)
Documentation
container of all footer rows within a table group (tgroup) - extended to include FOIG attributes

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1]
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="tfootType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="tfootType">
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: tbodyType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
tbodyType < tbodyType (by extension)
Documentation
container of all table body rows within a table group (tgroup) - extended to include FOIG attributes

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1]
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="tbodyType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="tbodyType">
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: rowType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
rowType < rowType (by extension)
Documentation
container for a table row - extended to include FOIG attributes

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1]

Attribute group reference (not shown): valignAttGrp
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="rowType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="rowType">
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="valignAttGrp"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: entryType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
entryType < entryType (by extension)
Documentation
container for a table cell - extended to include the actual FOIG content model for a FOIG table cell.

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 rowHeader="xs:boolean" [0..1] 
 bgColor="xs:string" [0..1] 
 id="idType" [0..1]
>
   Start Choice [1]
      Start Choice [0..*]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               Start Choice [1]
                  <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
                  <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
               End Choice
               <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            End Choice
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <warning> ... </warning> [1]
            <caution> ... </caution> [1]
            <note> ... </note> [1]
         End Choice
         <figure> ... </figure> [1]
         <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
         <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <limit> ... </limit> [1]
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <invalidConfig> ... </invalidConfig> [1]
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="entryType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="entryType">
         <xs:choice>
            <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
               <xs:group ref="shortTextGroupType"/>
               <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
               <xs:element ref="figure"/>
               <xs:element ref="multimedia"/>
               <xs:element ref="extApplication"/>
               <xs:group ref="entryExtensionGroup"/>
            </xs:choice>
            <xs:element ref="invalidConfig"/>
         </xs:choice>
         <xs:attribute name="rowHeader" type="xs:boolean" use="optional"/>
         <xs:attribute name="bgColor" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: ftnoteType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
ftnoteType < ftnoteType (by extension)
Used By
ftnote
Documentation
container for the footer of the table - extended to include the actual FOIG content model for the table foot note

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1]
>
   Start Choice [1]
      Start Group: textGroupType [1..*]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
               <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
            End Choice
            Start Choice [1]
               <para> paraType </para> [1] 
               <table> tableType </table> [1] 
               <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
               <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
            End Choice
            Start Choice [1]
               <case> caseType </case> [1] 
               <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
            End Choice
         End Choice
      End Group: textGroupType
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="ftnoteType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="ftnoteType">
         <xs:choice>
            <xs:group ref="textGroupType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
         </xs:choice>
         <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Elements

Element: abbreviation

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
messageType, , , , , , , electronicAnnunciationNameType, perfoEntryType
Documentation
A shortened form of a word or phrase.

XML Instance Representation 

<abbreviation
 glossaryItemId="xs:NCName" [1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="abbreviation">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:attribute name="glossaryItemId" type="xs:NCName" use="required"/>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: alternative

Type
alternativeElemType
Used By
multimediaElemType,
Documentation
alternative content in environment without support of multimedia format

XML Instance Representation 

<alternative
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
               <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
            End Choice
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
         End Choice
         <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
         <case> caseType </case> [1] 
         <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <table> tableType </table> [1]
   End Choice
</alternative>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="alternative" type="alternativeElemType"/>

Element: behavior

Type
behaviorElemType
Used By
dmRefElemType
Documentation
Specifies how the link operates, when a reference is supposed to be realized as a link.

XML Instance Representation 

<behavior
 linkShow="linkShowAttType" [0..1] 
 linkActuate="linkActuateAttType" [0..1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="behavior" type="behaviorElemType"/>

Element: caseCond

Type
nameType
Used By
caseType, caseCondBlockType,
Documentation
A condition

XML Instance Representation 

<caseCond
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
         <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
         <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
         <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
         <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
         <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
         <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
         <measure> ... </measure> [1]
         <equation> ... </equation> [1]
         <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
         <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
         <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</caseCond>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="caseCond" type="nameType"/>

Element: caution

Type
cautionType
Documentation
Call attention to the use of materials, processes, methods, procedures, or limits, which must be followed precisely to avoid damage to equipment.

XML Instance Representation 

<caution
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
   End Choice
</caution>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="caution" type="cautionType"/>

Element: commonCondition

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
performanceType, perfoDataType, perfoHeadEntryType,
Documentation
Values of paramaters that apply to the whole Performance table Body.

XML Instance Representation 

<commonCondition>
   <para> paraType </para> [0..1] 
   <commonCondition> ... </commonCondition> [0..*]
</commonCondition>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="commonCondition">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:sequence>
         <xs:element name="para" type="paraType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <xs:element ref="commonCondition" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      </xs:sequence>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: digitalPerformanceInfo

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Documentation
provided information of a digital performance software

XML Instance Representation 

<digitalPerformanceInfo>
   <modelIdent> ... </modelIdent> [1]
   <perfoSoftwareRef> ... </perfoSoftwareRef> [1]
   <perfoSoftwareVersion> ... </perfoSoftwareVersion> [1]
   <perfoDatabaseVersion> ... </perfoDatabaseVersion> [1]
</digitalPerformanceInfo>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="digitalPerformanceInfo">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:sequence>
         <xs:element ref="modelIdent"/>
         <xs:element ref="perfoSoftwareRef"/>
         <xs:element ref="perfoSoftwareVersion"/>
         <xs:element ref="perfoDatabaseVersion"/>
      </xs:sequence>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: dmCode

Type
dmCodeElemType
Used By
dmRefIdentElemType, dmIdentElemType
Documentation
data module code

XML Instance Representation 

<dmCode
 modelIdentCode="modelIdentCodeAttType" [1] 
 systemDiffCode="systemDiffCodeAttType" [1] 
 systemCode="systemCodeAttType" [1] 
 subSystemCode="subSystemCodeAttType" [1] 
 subSubSystemCode="subSubSystemCodeAttType" [1] 
 assyCode="assyCodeAttType" [1] 
 disassyCode="disassyCodeAttType" [1] 
 disassyCodeVariant="disassyCodeVariantAttType" [1] 
 infoCode="infoCodeAttType" [1] 
 infoCodeVariant="infoCodeVariantAttType" [1] 
 itemLocationCode="itemLocationCodeAttType" [1] 
 learnCode="learnCodeAttType" [0..1] 
 learnEventCode="learnEventCodeAttType" [0..1] 
 dispatchItemExtensionCode="xs:string (pattern = [A-Z0-9]{3}-[A-Z0-9]{4}-[A-Z0-9]{3})" [0..1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="dmCode" type="dmCodeElemType"/>

Element: dmIdent

Type
dmIdentElemType
Documentation
unique identification of the data module

XML Instance Representation 

<dmIdent>
   <identExtension> ... </identExtension> [0..1]
   <dmCode> ... </dmCode> [1]
   <language> ... </language> [1]
</dmIdent>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="dmIdent" type="dmIdentElemType"/>

Element: dmRef

Type
dmRefElemType
Used By
, dmRefItemType,
Documentation
References to data modules

XML Instance Representation 

<dmRef
 referredFragment="xs:string" [0..1] 
>
   <linktext> nameType </linktext> [0..1]
   <dmRefIdent> ... </dmRefIdent> [1]
   <behavior> ... </behavior> [0..1]
</dmRef>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="dmRef" type="dmRefElemType"/>

Element: dmRefIdent

Type
dmRefIdentElemType
Used By
dmRefElemType
Documentation
Contains the items forming a unique identification of the destination data module

XML Instance Representation 

<dmRefIdent>
   <identExtension> ... </identExtension> [0..1]
   <dmCode> ... </dmCode> [1]
   <language> ... </language> [1]
</dmRefIdent>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="dmRefIdent" type="dmRefIdentElemType"/>

Element: dmodule

Type
dmoduleElemType

XML Instance Representation 

<dmodule> dmoduleElemType </dmodule>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="dmodule" type="dmoduleElemType"/>

Element: electronicMessage

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
,
Documentation
An electronic message

XML Instance Representation 

<electronicMessage
 id="idType" [0..1]
 category="messageCategoryType" [1] 
 priorityLevel="priorityLevelType" [1] 
 priorityRanking="xs:string" [0..1] 
 displayStatus="xs:string (value comes from list: {'triggered'|'acknowledged'|'off'})" [0..1] 
 dynamicBehavior="xs:string (value comes from list: {'blinking'|'steady'})" [0..1] 
 origin="xs:string" [0..1] 
>
   <systemName
    instance="xs:string" [0..1] 
   > [0..1] 
      <!-- Mixed content -->
      Start Choice [0..*]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
      End Choice
   </systemName>
   <message> messageType </message> [0..1] 
   <subMessage> messageType </subMessage> [0..*] 
</electronicMessage>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="electronicMessage">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:complexContent>
         <xs:extension base="electronicAnnunciationNameType">
            <xs:attribute name="category" type="messageCategoryType" use="required"/>
            <xs:attribute name="priorityLevel" type="priorityLevelType" use="required"/>
            <xs:attribute name="priorityRanking" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
            <xs:attribute name="displayStatus" use="optional">
               <xs:simpleType>
                  <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
                     <xs:enumeration value="triggered"/>
                     <xs:enumeration value="acknowledged"/>
                     <xs:enumeration value="off"/>
                  </xs:restriction>
               </xs:simpleType>
            </xs:attribute>
            <xs:attribute name="dynamicBehavior" use="optional">
               <xs:simpleType>
                  <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
                     <xs:enumeration value="blinking"/>
                     <xs:enumeration value="steady"/>
                  </xs:restriction>
               </xs:simpleType>
            </xs:attribute>
            <xs:attribute name="origin" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
         </xs:extension>
      </xs:complexContent>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: electronicMessageBlock

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Documentation
A grouping of electronic messages

XML Instance Representation 

<electronicMessageBlock
 logicalOperator="logicalOperatorAndOrType" [1] 
>
   <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [2..*]
</electronicMessageBlock>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="electronicMessageBlock">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:sequence>
         <xs:element ref="electronicMessage" minOccurs="2" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      </xs:sequence>
      <xs:attributeGroup ref="logicalOperationAndOrAttGrp"/>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: emphasis

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
emphType, messageType, , , , ,
Documentation
Part of text to emphasize

XML Instance Representation 

<emphasis
 bold="xs:boolean" [0..1]
 italic="xs:boolean" [0..1]
 underline="xs:boolean" [0..1]
 overline="xs:boolean" [0..1]
 strikeout="xs:boolean" [0..1]
 case="xs:string (value comes from list: {'lower'|'upper'})" [0..1]
 color="xs:string" [0..1] 
 bgColor="xs:string" [0..1] 
 script="xs:string (value comes from list: {'sub'|'super'})" [0..1]
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
   End Choice
</emphasis>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="emphasis">
   <xs:complexType mixed="true">
      <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
      </xs:choice>
      <xs:attribute name="bold" type="xs:boolean" use="optional" default="false"/>
      <xs:attribute name="italic" type="xs:boolean" use="optional" default="false"/>
      <xs:attribute name="underline" type="xs:boolean" use="optional" default="false"/>
      <xs:attribute name="overline" type="xs:boolean" use="optional" default="false"/>
      <xs:attribute name="strikeout" type="xs:boolean" use="optional" default="false"/>
      <xs:attribute name="case" use="optional">
         <xs:simpleType>
            <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
               <xs:enumeration value="lower"/>
               <xs:enumeration value="upper"/>
            </xs:restriction>
         </xs:simpleType>
      </xs:attribute>
      <xs:attribute name="color" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
      <xs:attribute name="bgColor" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
      <xs:attribute name="script">
         <xs:simpleType>
            <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
               <xs:enumeration value="sub"/>
               <xs:enumeration value="super"/>
            </xs:restriction>
         </xs:simpleType>
      </xs:attribute>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: equation

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Documentation
A mathematical equation

XML Instance Representation 

<equation
 id="idType" [0..1]
>
   <m:math> ... </m:math> [1]
   <figure> ... </figure> [0..1]
</equation>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="equation">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:sequence>
         <xs:element ref="m:math"/>
         <xs:element ref="figure" minOccurs="0"/>
      </xs:sequence>
      <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: extApplication

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
, entryType, caseType, exampleType, listItemType, descriptionType, , commentType
Documentation
allow to launch an application from an active content

XML Instance Representation 

<extApplication
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1]
 name="xs:string" [1] 
>
   <linktext> nameType </linktext> [0..1] 
   <parameter> parameterElemType </parameter> [0..*] 
   <alternative> ... </alternative> [1]
</extApplication>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="extApplication">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:sequence>
         <xs:element name="linktext" type="nameType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <xs:element name="parameter" type="parameterElemType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
         <xs:element ref="alternative"/>
      </xs:sequence>
      <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
      <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
      <xs:attribute name="name" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: externalRef

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Documentation
External reference to a non-Spec2300 data fragment.

XML Instance Representation 

<externalRef
 productRefOwner="xs:string" [0..1] 
 productRefModel="xs:string" [0..1] 
 productRefSerial="xs:string" [0..1] 
 productRefName="xs:string" [0..1] 
 productRefNbr="xs:string" [0..1] 
 productRefDataFormat="xs:string" [0..1] 
 productRefDataSpec="xs:string" [0..1] 
 targetRefId="xs:string" [1] 
 targetRefTitle="xs:string" [0..1] 
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Group: basicMixedContentGroup [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
         <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
         <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
         <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
         <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
         <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
         <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
         <measure> ... </measure> [1]
         <equation> ... </equation> [1]
         <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
         <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
         <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
      End Choice
   End Group: basicMixedContentGroup
</externalRef>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="externalRef">
   <xs:complexType mixed="true">
      <xs:sequence>
         <xs:group ref="basicMixedContentGroup" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      </xs:sequence>
      <xs:attributeGroup ref="externalRefAttGrp"/>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: figure

Type
figureElemType
Used By
, , entryType, alternativeElemType, , caseType, exampleType, warningType, cautionType, noteType, listItemType, descriptionType, , commentType, perfoDataType, perfoTableType
Documentation
container for the graphical reference and information.

XML Instance Representation 

<figure
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   <displayInstructions> displayInstructionsType </displayInstructions> [0..*] 
   <linktext> nameType </linktext> [0..1] 
   <title> nameType </title> [0..1] 
   <graphic> ... </graphic> [1..3] 
</figure>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="figure" type="figureElemType"/>

Element: graphic

Type
graphicElemType
Used By
figureElemType
Documentation
contains the external reference to the illustration file

XML Instance Representation 

<graphic
 infoIdent="xs:string" [1] 
 extensionProducer="xs:string" [0..1] 
 extensionCode="xs:string" [0..1] 
 reproductionWidth="xs:string" [0..1]
 reproductionHeight="xs:string" [0..1]
 reproductionScale="xs:string" [0..1]
 mimeType="xs:string" [1] 
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1]
>
   <hotspot> ... </hotspot> [0..*]
   <legend> ... </legend> [0..1]
</graphic>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="graphic" type="graphicElemType"/>

Element: hotspot

Type
hotspotElemType
Used By
graphicElemType, hotspotElemType
Documentation
contains the definition of graphical regions in an illustration and contains information needed to navigate between graphical objects or between graphical objects and text

XML Instance Representation 

<hotspot
 applicationStructureIdent="xs:string" [0..1]
 applicationStructureName="xs:string" [0..1]
 hotspotTitle="xs:string" [0..1]
 hotspotType="xs:string" [0..1]
 objectCoordinates="xs:string" [0..1]
 objectDescr="xs:string" [0..1]
 visibility="visibilityAttType" [0..1]
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <hotspot> ... </hotspot> [1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <internalRef> ... </internalRef> [1]
         <dmRef> ... </dmRef> [1]
         <externalRef> ... </externalRef> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</hotspot>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="hotspot" type="hotspotElemType"/>

Element: identExtension

Type
identExtensionElemType
Used By
dmRefIdentElemType, dmIdentElemType
Documentation
producer unique subdomain for instance identification

XML Instance Representation 

<identExtension
 extensionProducer="xs:string" [1] 
 extensionCode="xs:string" [1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="identExtension" type="identExtensionElemType"/>

Element: ifInstalled

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
emphType,
Documentation
Flag an optional equipment

XML Instance Representation 

<ifInstalled>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
      <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
   End Choice
</ifInstalled>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="ifInstalled">
   <xs:complexType mixed="true">
      <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:element ref="emphasis"/>
         <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
         <xs:element ref="techLabel"/>
      </xs:choice>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: ifOperated

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
emphType,
Documentation
Flag an operated equipment

XML Instance Representation 

<ifOperated>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
      <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
   End Choice
</ifOperated>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="ifOperated">
   <xs:complexType mixed="true">
      <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:element ref="emphasis"/>
         <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
         <xs:element ref="techLabel"/>
      </xs:choice>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: ifOperative

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
emphType,
Documentation
Flag an operative equipment

XML Instance Representation 

<ifOperative>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
      <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
   End Choice
</ifOperative>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="ifOperative">
   <xs:complexType mixed="true">
      <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:element ref="emphasis"/>
         <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
         <xs:element ref="techLabel"/>
      </xs:choice>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: internalRef

Type
internalRefElemType
Documentation
Used to mark up a cross-reference from one point in a data module to another point in the same data module

XML Instance Representation 

<internalRef
 internalRefId="xs:IDREF" [0..1] 
 internalRefTargetType="internalRefTargetTypeAttType" [0..1] 
 targetTitle="xs:string" [0..1] 
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Group: basicMixedContentGroup [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
         <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
         <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
         <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
         <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
         <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
         <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
         <measure> ... </measure> [1]
         <equation> ... </equation> [1]
         <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
         <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
         <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
      End Choice
   End Group: basicMixedContentGroup
</internalRef>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="internalRef" type="internalRefElemType"/>

Element: invalidConfig

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
entryType, perfoEntryType
Documentation
Empty element allowing to tag in a table cell (perfo tables or regular tables) that this is an invalid/impossible value.

XML Instance Representation 

<invalidConfig/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="invalidConfig">
   <xs:complexType/>
</xs:element>

Element: language

Type
languageElemType
Used By
dmRefIdentElemType, dmIdentElemType
Documentation
describe the language in which the data module is written

XML Instance Representation 

<language
 languageIsoCode="languageIsoCodeAttType" [1] 
 countryIsoCode="countryIsoCodeAttType" [1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="language" type="languageElemType"/>

Element: legend

Type
legendElemType
Used By
graphicElemType
Documentation
contains the legend

XML Instance Representation 

<legend
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
               <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
            End Choice
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
         End Choice
         <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
         <case> caseType </case> [1] 
         <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</legend>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="legend" type="legendElemType"/>

Element: limit

Type
limitPerfoType
Used By
, , ,
Documentation
limitation (perfValue or literal) optionally followed by a comment. Used if the operation of the airplane is restricted.

XML Instance Representation 

<limit
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1]
      <perfValue> perfValueType </perfValue> [1] 
      Start Group: literalLimitPerfoGroup [1..*]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               Start Choice [1]
                  <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
                  <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
               End Choice
               Start Choice [1]
                  <para> paraType </para> [1] 
                  <table> tableType </table> [1] 
                  <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
                  <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
               End Choice
               Start Choice [1]
                  <case> caseType </case> [1] 
                  <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
               End Choice
            End Choice
            <figure> ... </figure> [1]
            <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
            <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <warning> ... </warning> [1]
               <caution> ... </caution> [1]
               <note> ... </note> [1]
            End Choice
         End Choice
      End Group: literalLimitPerfoGroup
   End Choice
   <comment> commentType </comment> [0..1]
</limit>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="limit" type="limitPerfoType"/>

Element: measure

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
messageType, ,
Documentation
A measure: with a specific unit : contains a decimal and has a unit attribute (such as meter, inch, kg, ....).

XML Instance Representation 

<measure
 measurementSystem="xs:string (value comes from list: {'si'|'us'|'other'})" [1] 
 category="xs:string" [1] 
 subCategory="xs:string" [0..1] 
 unit="xs:string" [1] 
 showUnit="xs:boolean" [0..1] 
 bound="xs:NMTOKEN (value comes from list: {'min'|'max'|'minMax'})" [0..1] 
>
    xs:decimal
</measure>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="measure">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:simpleContent>
         <xs:extension base="xs:decimal">
            <xs:attribute name="measurementSystem" use="required">
               <xs:simpleType>
                  <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
                     <xs:enumeration value="si"/>
                     <xs:enumeration value="us"/>
                     <xs:enumeration value="other"/>
                  </xs:restriction>
               </xs:simpleType>
            </xs:attribute>
            <xs:attribute name="category" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
            <xs:attribute name="subCategory" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
            <xs:attribute name="unit" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
            <xs:attribute name="showUnit" type="xs:boolean" use="optional" default="true"/>
            <xs:attribute name="bound" use="optional">
               <xs:simpleType>
                  <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
                     <xs:enumeration value="min"/>
                     <xs:enumeration value="max"/>
                     <xs:enumeration value="minMax"/>
                  </xs:restriction>
               </xs:simpleType>
            </xs:attribute>
         </xs:extension>
      </xs:simpleContent>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: measureBlock

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Documentation
pair of measures to provide the same business measure for two different measurement systems.

XML Instance Representation 

<measureBlock>
   <measure> ... </measure> [2..2]
</measureBlock>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="measureBlock">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:sequence>
         <xs:element ref="measure" minOccurs="2" maxOccurs="2"/>
      </xs:sequence>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: modelIdent

Type
modelIdentType
Documentation
Identification info about the model

XML Instance Representation 

<modelIdent
 majorModelCode="xs:string" [1] 
 minorModelCode="xs:string" [0..1] 
 modelDesignation="xs:string" [0..1] 
 modelMarketDesignator="xs:string (value comes from list: {'civil'|'military'|'business'|'cargo'})" [0..1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="modelIdent" type="modelIdentType"/>

Element: multimedia

Type
multimediaElemType
Used By
, entryType, caseType, exampleType, listItemType, descriptionType, , commentType
Documentation
container for multimedia data

XML Instance Representation 

<multimedia
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1]
>
   <title> nameType </title> [0..1] 
   <multimediaObject> ... </multimediaObject> [1..*]
   <alternative> ... </alternative> [1]
</multimedia>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="multimedia" type="multimediaElemType"/>

Element: multimediaObject

Type
multimediaObjectElemType
Used By
multimediaElemType
Documentation
contains the external reference to the multimedia file

XML Instance Representation 

<multimediaObject
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 infoIdent="xs:string" [1] 
 extensionProducer="xs:string" [0..1] 
 extensionCode="xs:string" [0..1] 
 mimeType="xs:string" [0..1] 
 autoPlay="yesOrNoAttType" [0..1]
 fullScreen="yesOrNoAttType" [0..1]
 multimediaObjectHeight="xs:string" [0..1]
 multimediaObjectWidth="xs:string" [0..1]
 runTimeDuration="xs:integer" [0..1]
 showPluginControls="showPluginControlsAttType" [0..1]
>
   <parameter> ... </parameter> [0..1]
</multimediaObject>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="multimediaObject" type="multimediaObjectElemType"/>

Element: note

Type
noteType
Used By
, perfoDataType
Documentation
Descriptive information used to provide recommendations or additional information, but not directly required for the accomplishment of a procedure.

XML Instance Representation 

<note
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
   End Choice
</note>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="note" type="noteType"/>

Element: parameter

Type
parameterElemType
Used By
multimediaObjectElemType
Documentation
parameters of an multimedia object

XML Instance Representation 

<parameter
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 parameterIdent="xs:string" [0..1]
 parameterName="xs:string" [0..1]
 parameterValue="xs:string" [0..1]
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="parameter" type="parameterElemType"/>

Element: perfoContent

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
performanceType, performanceSubLevelType

XML Instance Representation 

<perfoContent
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <para> paraType </para> [1] 
         <table> tableType </table> [1] 
         <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
         <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
         <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <case> caseType </case> [1] 
         <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
      <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
      <limit> ... </limit> [1]
      <perform> ... </perform> [1]
      <perfoData> ... </perfoData> [1]
      <digitalPerformanceInfo> ... </digitalPerformanceInfo> [1]
   End Choice
</perfoContent>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="perfoContent">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:group ref="coreTextGroup"/>
         <xs:group ref="listGroup"/>
         <xs:group ref="caseGroup"/>
         <xs:element ref="figure"/>
         <xs:element ref="multimedia"/>
         <xs:element ref="extApplication"/>
         <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
         <xs:element ref="limit"/>
         <xs:element ref="perform"/>
         <xs:element ref="perfoData"/>
         <xs:element ref="digitalPerformanceInfo"/>
      </xs:choice>
      <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: perfoData

Type
perfoDataType
Documentation
Performance tables

XML Instance Representation 

<perfoData>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      <commonCondition> ... </commonCondition> [1]
      <table> perfoTableType </table> [1] 
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <note> ... </note> [1]
   End Choice
</perfoData>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="perfoData" type="perfoDataType"/>

Element: perfoDatabaseVersion

Type
emphType
Documentation
Performance database version

XML Instance Representation 

<perfoDatabaseVersion>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
      <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
      <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
   End Choice
</perfoDatabaseVersion>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="perfoDatabaseVersion" type="emphType"/>

Element: perfoSoftwareRef

Type
emphType
Documentation
Performance software reference, such as serial number

XML Instance Representation 

<perfoSoftwareRef>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
      <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
      <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
   End Choice
</perfoSoftwareRef>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="perfoSoftwareRef" type="emphType"/>

Element: perfoSoftwareVersion

Type
emphType
Documentation
Performance software version

XML Instance Representation 

<perfoSoftwareVersion>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
      <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
      <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
   End Choice
</perfoSoftwareVersion>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="perfoSoftwareVersion" type="emphType"/>

Element: perform

Type
limitPerfoType
Documentation
Listing of performance decrements (list, table, statements, graphics, etc.). Used if the airplane’s baseline performance is affected

XML Instance Representation 

<perform
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1]
      <perfValue> perfValueType </perfValue> [1] 
      Start Group: literalLimitPerfoGroup [1..*]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               Start Choice [1]
                  <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
                  <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
               End Choice
               Start Choice [1]
                  <para> paraType </para> [1] 
                  <table> tableType </table> [1] 
                  <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
                  <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
               End Choice
               Start Choice [1]
                  <case> caseType </case> [1] 
                  <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
               End Choice
            End Choice
            <figure> ... </figure> [1]
            <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
            <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <warning> ... </warning> [1]
               <caution> ... </caution> [1]
               <note> ... </note> [1]
            End Choice
         End Choice
      End Group: literalLimitPerfoGroup
   End Choice
   <comment> commentType </comment> [0..1]
</perform>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="perform" type="limitPerfoType"/>

Element: performance

Type
performanceType
Used By
contentElemType
Documentation
A data module containing performance data

XML Instance Representation 

<performance
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   <title> nameType </title> [1] 
   <commonCondition> ... </commonCondition> [0..1]
   Start Choice [1]
      <perfoContent> ... </perfoContent> [1] 
      <subLevel> performanceSubLevelType </subLevel> [1] 
   End Choice
   <subLevel> performanceSubLevelType </subLevel> [0..*] 
</performance>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="performance" type="performanceType"/>

Element: refs

Type
Locally-defined complex type

XML Instance Representation 

<refs>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      <dmRef> ... </dmRef> [1]
   End Choice
</refs>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="refs">
   <xs:complexType>
      <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:element ref="dmRef"/>
      </xs:choice>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: symbol

Type
symbolElemType
Used By
messageType,
Documentation
contains illustrations and graphics that are intended to be presented inline within the normal text.

XML Instance Representation 

<symbol
 infoIdent="xs:string" [1] 
 extensionProducer="xs:string" [0..1] 
 extensionCode="xs:string" [0..1] 
 reproductionWidth="xs:string" [0..1]
 reproductionHeight="xs:string" [0..1]
 reproductionScale="xs:string" [0..1]
 mimeType="xs:string" [1] 
 id="idType" [0..1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="symbol" type="symbolElemType"/>

Element: techLabel

Type
Locally-defined complex type
Used By
messageType, , , ,
Documentation
A technical label.

XML Instance Representation 

<techLabel
 type="xs:string" [1]
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
   End Choice
</techLabel>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="techLabel">
   <xs:complexType mixed="true">
      <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
         <xs:element ref="emphasis"/>
      </xs:choice>
      <xs:attribute name="type" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
   </xs:complexType>
</xs:element>

Element: warning

Type
warningType
Documentation
Call attention to the use of materials, processes, methods, procedures, or limits, which must be followed precisely to avoid injury to persons.

XML Instance Representation 

<warning
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
   End Choice
</warning>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:element name="warning" type="warningType"/>

Complex Types

Complex Type: alternativeElemType

Used By
alternative

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
               <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
            End Choice
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
         End Choice
         <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
         <case> caseType </case> [1] 
         <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <table> tableType </table> [1]
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="alternativeElemType">
   <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="shortTextGroupType"/>
      <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
      <xs:element ref="figure"/>
      <xs:element name="table" type="tableType"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: basicTextIdType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
basicTextType < basicTextIdType (by extension)

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Group: basicTextGroupType [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         <para> paraType </para> [1] 
      End Choice
   End Group: basicTextGroupType
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="basicTextIdType">
   <xs:complexContent>
      <xs:extension base="basicTextType">
         <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
      </xs:extension>
   </xs:complexContent>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: basicTextType

Type hierarchy:

Sub-types:
  • basicTextIdType (by extension)

XML Instance Representation 

<...>
   Start Group: basicTextGroupType [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         <para> paraType </para> [1] 
      End Choice
   End Group: basicTextGroupType
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="basicTextType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:group ref="basicTextGroupType" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
   </xs:sequence>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: behaviorElemType

Used By
behavior

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 linkShow="linkShowAttType" [0..1] 
 linkActuate="linkActuateAttType" [0..1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="behaviorElemType">
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="behaviorAttGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: caseCondBlockType

Used By
caseCondBlock
Documentation
a block of condition

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 logicalOperator="logicalOperatorType" [1] 
>
   <caseCond> ... </caseCond> [2..*] 
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="caseCondBlockType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="caseCond" minOccurs="2" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="logicalOperatorAttGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: caseType

Used By
case, case, case
Documentation
A part of description content under a condition

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 direct="xs:boolean" [0..1] 
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   <caseCond> ... </caseCond> [1]
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
      <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <limit> ... </limit> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="caseType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="caseCond"/>
      <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:group ref="textGroupType"/>
         <xs:element ref="figure"/>
         <xs:element ref="multimedia"/>
         <xs:element ref="extApplication"/>
         <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
         <xs:group ref="caseExtensionGroup"/>
      </xs:choice>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="caseAttrGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: cautionType

Used By
caution

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="cautionType">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="textGroupType"/>
      <xs:element ref="figure"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: commentType

Used By
comment

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
      <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="commentType">
   <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="textGroupType"/>
      <xs:element ref="figure"/>
      <xs:element ref="multimedia"/>
      <xs:element ref="extApplication"/>
      <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: commonListType

Used By
