seqList, randList

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 listStyle="xs:NMTOKEN" [0..1] 
 associationType="xs:string (value comes from list: {'inclusive'|'exclusive'})" [0..1] 
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   <listTitle> nameType </listTitle> [0..1] 
   <para> paraType </para> [0..*] 
   <listItem> listItemType </listItem> [1..*] 
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="commonListType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element name="listTitle" type="nameType" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element name="para" type="paraType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      <xs:element name="listItem" type="listItemType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="commonListAttrGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: descriptionType

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
      <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="descriptionType">
   <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="textGroupType"/>
      <xs:element ref="figure"/>
      <xs:element ref="multimedia"/>
      <xs:element ref="extApplication"/>
      <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: displayInstructionsType

Used By
displayInstructions

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 targetName="xs:string" [1] 
 anchorMode="xs:string (value comes from list: {'inline'|'thumbnaill'|'linkText'|'unanchored'})" [0..1] 
 displayMode="xs:string (value comes from list: {'inlineLeft'|'inlineRight'|'inlineCenter'|'frameVertical'|'frameHorizontal'})" [0..1] 
 spread="xs:boolean" [0..1] 
 zoomMode="xs:integer" [0..1] 
 rotation="xs:string (value comes from list: {'clockwise'|'antiClockwise'})" [0..1] 
 gColor="xs:boolean" [0..1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="displayInstructionsType">
   <xs:attribute name="targetName" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="anchorMode" use="optional">
      <xs:simpleType>
         <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
            <xs:enumeration value="inline"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="thumbnaill"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="linkText"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="unanchored"/>
         </xs:restriction>
      </xs:simpleType>
   </xs:attribute>
   <xs:attribute name="displayMode" use="optional">
      <xs:simpleType>
         <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
            <xs:enumeration value="inlineLeft"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="inlineRight"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="inlineCenter"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="frameVertical"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="frameHorizontal"/>
         </xs:restriction>
      </xs:simpleType>
   </xs:attribute>
   <xs:attribute name="spread" type="xs:boolean" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="zoomMode" type="xs:integer" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="rotation" use="optional">
      <xs:simpleType>
         <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
            <xs:enumeration value="clockwise"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="antiClockwise"/>
         </xs:restriction>
      </xs:simpleType>
   </xs:attribute>
   <xs:attribute name="gColor" type="xs:boolean" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: dmCodeElemType

Used By
dmCode

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 modelIdentCode="modelIdentCodeAttType" [1] 
 systemDiffCode="systemDiffCodeAttType" [1] 
 systemCode="systemCodeAttType" [1] 
 subSystemCode="subSystemCodeAttType" [1] 
 subSubSystemCode="subSubSystemCodeAttType" [1] 
 assyCode="assyCodeAttType" [1] 
 disassyCode="disassyCodeAttType" [1] 
 disassyCodeVariant="disassyCodeVariantAttType" [1] 
 infoCode="infoCodeAttType" [1] 
 infoCodeVariant="infoCodeVariantAttType" [1] 
 itemLocationCode="itemLocationCodeAttType" [1] 
 learnCode="learnCodeAttType" [0..1] 
 learnEventCode="learnEventCodeAttType" [0..1] 
 dispatchItemExtensionCode="xs:string (pattern = [A-Z0-9]{3}-[A-Z0-9]{4}-[A-Z0-9]{3})" [0..1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="dmCodeElemType">
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="dmCodeAttGrp"/>
   <xs:attribute name="dispatchItemExtensionCode" use="optional">
      <xs:simpleType>
         <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
            <xs:pattern value="[A-Z0-9]{3}-[A-Z0-9]{4}-[A-Z0-9]{3}"/>
         </xs:restriction>
      </xs:simpleType>
   </xs:attribute>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: dmIdentElemType

Used By
dmIdent

XML Instance Representation 

<...>
   <identExtension> ... </identExtension> [0..1]
   <dmCode> ... </dmCode> [1]
   <language> ... </language> [1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="dmIdentElemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="identExtension" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="dmCode"/>
      <xs:element ref="language"/>
   </xs:sequence>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: dmRefElemType

Used By
dmRef

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 referredFragment="xs:string" [0..1] 
>
   <linktext> nameType </linktext> [0..1]
   <dmRefIdent> ... </dmRefIdent> [1]
   <behavior> ... </behavior> [0..1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="dmRefElemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element name="linktext" type="nameType" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="dmRefIdent"/>
      <xs:element ref="behavior" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="referredFragment" type="xs:string"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: dmRefIdentElemType

Used By
dmRefIdent

XML Instance Representation 

<...>
   <identExtension> ... </identExtension> [0..1]
   <dmCode> ... </dmCode> [1]
   <language> ... </language> [1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="dmRefIdentElemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="identExtension" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="dmCode"/>
      <xs:element ref="language"/>
   </xs:sequence>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: dmRefItemType

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   <dmRef> ... </dmRef> [1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="dmRefItemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="dmRef"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: electronicAnnunciationNameType

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1]
>
   <systemName
    instance="xs:string" [0..1] 
   > [0..1] 
      <!-- Mixed content -->
      Start Choice [0..*]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
      End Choice
   </systemName>
   <message> messageType </message> [0..1] 
   <subMessage> messageType </subMessage> [0..*] 
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="electronicAnnunciationNameType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element name="systemName" minOccurs="0">
         <xs:complexType mixed="true">
            <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
               <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
            </xs:choice>
            <xs:attribute name="instance" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
         </xs:complexType>
      </xs:element>
      <xs:element name="message" type="messageType" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element name="subMessage" type="messageType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: emphType

Used By
perfoSoftwareRef, perfoSoftwareVersion, perfoDatabaseVersion
Documentation
basic mixed content with emphasis and ifInstalled

XML Instance Representation 

<...>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
      <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
      <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="emphType" mixed="true">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:element ref="emphasis"/>
      <xs:element ref="ifInstalled"/>
      <xs:element ref="ifOperated"/>
      <xs:element ref="ifOperative"/>
   </xs:choice>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: exampleType

Used By
example

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   <title> nameType </title> [0..1] 
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
      <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="exampleType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element name="title" type="nameType" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:group ref="textGroupType"/>
         <xs:element ref="figure"/>
         <xs:element ref="multimedia"/>
         <xs:element ref="extApplication"/>
         <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
      </xs:choice>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: exclusiveCasesType

Used By
exclusiveCases, exclusiveCases
Documentation
List of exclusive conditional descriptive content

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Group: conditionIntroGroup [0..1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <caseCond> ... </caseCond> [1] 
         <caseCondBlock> caseCondBlockType </caseCondBlock> [1] 
      End Choice
   End Group: conditionIntroGroup
   <case> caseType </case> [2..*]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="exclusiveCasesType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:group ref="conditionIntroGroup" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element name="case" type="caseType" minOccurs="2" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: figureElemType

Used By
figure

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   <displayInstructions> displayInstructionsType </displayInstructions> [0..*] 
   <linktext> nameType </linktext> [0..1] 
   <title> nameType </title> [0..1] 
   <graphic> ... </graphic> [1..3] 
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="figureElemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element name="displayInstructions" type="displayInstructionsType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      <xs:element name="linktext" type="nameType" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element name="title" type="nameType" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="graphic" maxOccurs="3"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: graphicElemType

Used By
graphic

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 infoIdent="xs:string" [1] 
 extensionProducer="xs:string" [0..1] 
 extensionCode="xs:string" [0..1] 
 reproductionWidth="xs:string" [0..1]
 reproductionHeight="xs:string" [0..1]
 reproductionScale="xs:string" [0..1]
 mimeType="xs:string" [1] 
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1]
>
   <hotspot> ... </hotspot> [0..*]
   <legend> ... </legend> [0..1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="graphicElemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="hotspot" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      <xs:element ref="legend" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="graphicAttGrp"/>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: hotspotElemType

Used By
hotspot

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 applicationStructureIdent="xs:string" [0..1]
 applicationStructureName="xs:string" [0..1]
 hotspotTitle="xs:string" [0..1]
 hotspotType="xs:string" [0..1]
 objectCoordinates="xs:string" [0..1]
 objectDescr="xs:string" [0..1]
 visibility="visibilityAttType" [0..1]
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <hotspot> ... </hotspot> [1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <internalRef> ... </internalRef> [1]
         <dmRef> ... </dmRef> [1]
         <externalRef> ... </externalRef> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="hotspotElemType">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:element ref="hotspot"/>
      <xs:group ref="crossRefGroup"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="hotspotAttGrp"/>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: identExtensionElemType

Used By
identExtension

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 extensionProducer="xs:string" [1] 
 extensionCode="xs:string" [1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="identExtensionElemType">
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="identExtensionAttGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: interTextType

XML Instance Representation 

<...>
   Start Group: interTextGroupType [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
               <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
            End Choice
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
         End Choice
         <table> tableType </table> [1] 
         <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
      End Choice
   End Group: interTextGroupType
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="interTextType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:group ref="interTextGroupType" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
   </xs:sequence>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: internalRefElemType

Used By
internalRef

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 internalRefId="xs:IDREF" [0..1] 
 internalRefTargetType="internalRefTargetTypeAttType" [0..1] 
 targetTitle="xs:string" [0..1] 
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Group: basicMixedContentGroup [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
         <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
         <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
         <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
         <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
         <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
         <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
         <measure> ... </measure> [1]
         <equation> ... </equation> [1]
         <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
         <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
         <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
      End Choice
   End Group: basicMixedContentGroup
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="internalRefElemType" mixed="true">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:group ref="basicMixedContentGroup" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="internalRefAttGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: languageElemType

Used By
language

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 languageIsoCode="languageIsoCodeAttType" [1] 
 countryIsoCode="countryIsoCodeAttType" [1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="languageElemType">
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="languageAttGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: leftPartType

Used By
leftPart
Documentation
Type of the left part of a paired item

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
         <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
         <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
         <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
         <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
         <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
         <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
         <measure> ... </measure> [1]
         <equation> ... </equation> [1]
         <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
         <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
         <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <internalRef> ... </internalRef> [1]
         <dmRef> ... </dmRef> [1]
         <externalRef> ... </externalRef> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="leftPartType" mixed="true">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="basicMixedContentGroup"/>
      <xs:group ref="crossRefGroup"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: legendElemType

Used By
legend

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
               <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
            End Choice
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
         End Choice
         <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
         <case> caseType </case> [1] 
         <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="legendElemType">
   <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="shortTextGroupType"/>
      <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: limitPerfoType

Used By
limit, perform

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [1]
      <perfValue> perfValueType </perfValue> [1] 
      Start Group: literalLimitPerfoGroup [1..*]
         Start Choice [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               Start Choice [1]
                  <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
                  <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
               End Choice
               Start Choice [1]
                  <para> paraType </para> [1] 
                  <table> tableType </table> [1] 
                  <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
                  <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
               End Choice
               Start Choice [1]
                  <case> caseType </case> [1] 
                  <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
               End Choice
            End Choice
            <figure> ... </figure> [1]
            <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
            <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
            Start Choice [1]
               <warning> ... </warning> [1]
               <caution> ... </caution> [1]
               <note> ... </note> [1]
            End Choice
         End Choice
      End Group: literalLimitPerfoGroup
   End Choice
   <comment> commentType </comment> [0..1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="limitPerfoType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:choice>
         <xs:element name="perfValue" type="perfValueType"/>
         <xs:group ref="literalLimitPerfoGroup" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      </xs:choice>
      <xs:element name="comment" type="commentType" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: listItemType

Used By
listItem
Documentation
Type definition for a list item

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <warning> ... </warning> [1]
         <caution> ... </caution> [1]
         <note> ... </note> [1]
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
      <multimedia> ... </multimedia> [1]
      <extApplication> ... </extApplication> [1]
      Start Choice [1]
         <limit> ... </limit> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="listItemType">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="textGroupType"/>
      <xs:group ref="wcnGroupType"/>
      <xs:element ref="figure"/>
      <xs:element ref="multimedia"/>
      <xs:element ref="extApplication"/>
      <xs:group ref="listItemExtensionGroup"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="listItemAttrGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: messageType

Used By
message, subMessage
Documentation
A electronic message content.

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
      <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
      <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
      <measure> ... </measure> [1]
      <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="messageType" mixed="true">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
      <xs:element ref="techLabel"/>
      <xs:element ref="emphasis"/>
      <xs:element ref="measure"/>
      <xs:element ref="symbol"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: modelIdentType

Used By
modelIdent

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 majorModelCode="xs:string" [1] 
 minorModelCode="xs:string" [0..1] 
 modelDesignation="xs:string" [0..1] 
 modelMarketDesignator="xs:string (value comes from list: {'civil'|'military'|'business'|'cargo'})" [0..1] 
/>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="modelIdentType">
   <xs:attribute name="majorModelCode" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="minorModelCode" type="xs:string"/>
   <xs:attribute name="modelDesignation" type="xs:string"/>
   <xs:attribute name="modelMarketDesignator">
      <xs:simpleType>
         <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
            <xs:enumeration value="civil"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="military"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="business"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="cargo"/>
         </xs:restriction>
      </xs:simpleType>
   </xs:attribute>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: multimediaElemType

Used By
multimedia

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1]
>
   <title> nameType </title> [0..1] 
   <multimediaObject> ... </multimediaObject> [1..*]
   <alternative> ... </alternative> [1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="multimediaElemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element name="title" type="nameType" minOccurs="0"/>
      <xs:element ref="multimediaObject" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      <xs:element ref="alternative"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: multimediaObjectElemType

Used By
multimediaObject

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 infoIdent="xs:string" [1] 
 extensionProducer="xs:string" [0..1] 
 extensionCode="xs:string" [0..1] 
 mimeType="xs:string" [0..1] 
 autoPlay="yesOrNoAttType" [0..1]
 fullScreen="yesOrNoAttType" [0..1]
 multimediaObjectHeight="xs:string" [0..1]
 multimediaObjectWidth="xs:string" [0..1]
 runTimeDuration="xs:integer" [0..1]
 showPluginControls="showPluginControlsAttType" [0..1]
>
   <parameter> ... </parameter> [0..1]
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="multimediaObjectElemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element ref="parameter" minOccurs="0"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="infoIdent" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="icnExtensionAttGrp"/>
   <xs:attribute name="mimeType" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="multimediaObjectAttGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: nameType

Used By
title, title, linktext, title, linktext, title, linktext, caseCond, title, listTitle
Documentation
A common name that can be used for identifidation purposes or navigation events.

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
         <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
         <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
         <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
         <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
         <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
         <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
         <measure> ... </measure> [1]
         <equation> ... </equation> [1]
         <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
         <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
         <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="nameType" mixed="true">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="basicMixedContentGroup"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: noteType

Used By
note
Documentation
Descriptive information used to provide recommendations or additional information, but not directly required for the accomplishment of a procedure.

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]
         Start Choice [1]
            <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
            <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <para> paraType </para> [1] 
            <table> tableType </table> [1] 
            <pairedItem> pairedItemType </pairedItem> [1] 
            <example> exampleType </example> [1] 
         End Choice
         Start Choice [1]
            <case> caseType </case> [1] 
            <exclusiveCases> exclusiveCasesType </exclusiveCases> [1] 
         End Choice
      End Choice
      <figure> ... </figure> [1]
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="noteType">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="textGroupType"/>
      <xs:element ref="figure"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: pairedItemType

Used By
pairedItem, pairedItem, pairedItem
Documentation
A Pair allowing bi-column association optionally with a separator character-

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 sepchar="xs:string" [0..1] 
 width="xs:decimal (value <= 100)" [1] 
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   <leftPart> leftPartType </leftPart> [1] 
   <rightPart> rightPartType </rightPart> [1] 
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="pairedItemType">
   <xs:sequence>
      <xs:element name="leftPart" type="leftPartType"/>
      <xs:element name="rightPart" type="rightPartType"/>
   </xs:sequence>
   <xs:attribute name="sepchar" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="width" use="required">
      <xs:simpleType>
         <xs:restriction base="xs:decimal">
            <xs:maxInclusive value="100"/>
         </xs:restriction>
      </xs:simpleType>
   </xs:attribute>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: paraType

Used By

XML Instance Representation 

<...
 id="idType" [0..1] 
 layer="layerType" [0..1] 
>
   <!-- Mixed content -->
   Start Choice [0..*]
      Start Choice [1]

         <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
         <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
         <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
         <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
         <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
         <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
         <measure> ... </measure> [1]
         <equation> ... </equation> [1]
         <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
         <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
         <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
      End Choice
      Start Choice [1]
         <internalRef> ... </internalRef> [1]
         <dmRef> ... </dmRef> [1]
         <externalRef> ... </externalRef> [1]
      End Choice
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="paraType" mixed="true">
   <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:group ref="basicMixedContentGroup"/>
      <xs:group ref="crossRefGroup"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:complexType>

   Start Choice [1..*]

   End Choice

Complex Type: perfoEntryType

Used By
entry

XML Instance Representation 

<...

Attribute group reference (not shown): entryAttGrp
 id="idType" [0..1]
>
   Start Choice [1]
      <rowValue> paraType </rowValue> [1..*] 
      <perfoOutput
       splitArea="xs:string" [0..1] 
      > [1..*]  
         <!-- Mixed content -->
         Start Choice [0..*]
            <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
         End Choice
      </perfoOutput>
      <invalidConfig> ... </invalidConfig> [1]
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="perfoEntryType">
   <xs:choice>
      <xs:element name="rowValue" type="paraType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
      <xs:element name="perfoOutput" maxOccurs="unbounded">
         <xs:complexType mixed="true">
            <xs:choice minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded">
               <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
            </xs:choice>
            <xs:attributeGroup ref="splitAreaAttGrp"/>
         </xs:complexType>
      </xs:element>
      <xs:element ref="invalidConfig"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="entryAttGrp"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Complex Type: perfoFootEntryType

Used By
entry

XML Instance Representation 

<...

Attribute group reference (not shown): entryAttGrp
 id="idType" [0..1]
>
   Start Choice [1..*]
      <splitDefinition
       id="idType" [0..1] 
       layer="layerType" [0..1] 
       splitArea="xs:string" [0..1] 
      > [1]  
         Start Choice [0..*]
            Start Choice [1]
               <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
               <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
               <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
               <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
               <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
               <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
               <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
               <measure> ... </measure> [1]
               <equation> ... </equation> [1]
               <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
               <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
               <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
            End Choice
            Start Choice [1]
               <internalRef> ... </internalRef> [1]
               <dmRef> ... </dmRef> [1]
               <externalRef> ... </externalRef> [1]
            End Choice
         End Choice
      </splitDefinition>
      <correctionType> paraType </correctionType> [1] 
      <correctionValue> paraType </correctionValue> [1] 
      <para> paraType </para> [1] 
   End Choice
</...>

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:complexType name="perfoFootEntryType">
   <xs:choice maxOccurs="unbounded">
      <xs:element name="splitDefinition">
         <xs:complexType>
            <xs:complexContent>
               <xs:extension base="paraType">
                  <xs:attributeGroup ref="splitAreaAttGrp"/>
               </xs:extension>
            </xs:complexContent>
         </xs:complexType>
      </xs:element>
      <xs:element name="correctionType" type="paraType"/>
      <xs:element name="correctionValue" type="paraType"/>
      <xs:element name="para" type="paraType"/>
   </xs:choice>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="entryAttGrp"/>
   <xs:attributeGroup ref="idAttGrp"/>
</xs:complexType>

Groups

Model Group: basicMixedContentGroup

Documentation
Set of basic element included in mixed content

XML Instance Representation 

Start Choice [1]
   <abbreviation> ... </abbreviation> [1]
   <techLabel> ... </techLabel> [1]
   <emphasis> ... </emphasis> [1]
   <ifInstalled> ... </ifInstalled> [1]
   <ifOperated> ... </ifOperated> [1]
   <ifOperative> ... </ifOperative> [1]
   <measureBlock> ... </measureBlock> [1]
   <measure> ... </measure> [1]
   <equation> ... </equation> [1]
   <electronicMessage> ... </electronicMessage> [1]
   <electronicMessageBlock> ... </electronicMessageBlock> [1]
   <symbol> ... </symbol> [1]
End Choice

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:group name="basicMixedContentGroup">
   <xs:choice>
      <xs:element ref="abbreviation"/>
      <xs:element ref="techLabel"/>
      <xs:element ref="emphasis"/>
      <xs:element ref="ifInstalled"/>
      <xs:element ref="ifOperated"/>
      <xs:element ref="ifOperative"/>
      <xs:element ref="measureBlock"/>
      <xs:element ref="measure"/>
      <xs:element ref="equation"/>
      <xs:element ref="electronicMessage"/>
      <xs:element ref="electronicMessageBlock"/>
      <xs:element ref="symbol"/>
   </xs:choice>
</xs:group>

Model Group: basicTextGroupType

Documentation
A standard grouping of textually oriented data

XML Instance Representation 

Start Choice [1]
   Start Choice [1]
      <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1] 
      <randList> commonListType </randList> [1] 
   End Choice
   <para> paraType </para> [1] 
End Choice

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:group name="basicTextGroupType">
   <xs:choice>
      <xs:group ref="listGroup"/>
      <xs:element name="para" type="paraType"/>
   </xs:choice>
</xs:group>

Documentation

Start Choice [1]

      <seqList> commonListType </seqList> [1]

Model Group: wcnGroupType

Documentation
A grouping of elements that provide advisory information of special significance or emphasis.

XML Instance Representation 

Start Choice [1]
   <warning> ... </warning> [1]
   <caution> ... </caution> [1]
   <note> ... </note> [1]
End Choice

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:group name="wcnGroupType">
   <xs:choice>
      <xs:element ref="warning"/>
      <xs:element ref="caution"/>
      <xs:element ref="note"/>
   </xs:choice>
</xs:group>

Types

Simple Type: assyCodeAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < assyCodeAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = ([A-Z0-9]{2}|[A-Z0-9]{4})

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="assyCodeAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="([A-Z0-9]{2}|[A-Z0-9]{4})"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < countryIsoCodeAttType (by restriction)

None

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z]{2}

<xs:simpleType name="countryIsoCodeAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="[A-Z]{2}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: internalRefTargetTypeAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:NMTOKEN < internalRefTargetTypeAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'figure'|'table'|'multimedia'|'multimediaObject'|'paragraph'|'graphic'|'hotspot'|'other'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="internalRefTargetTypeAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
      <xs:enumeration value="figure"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="table"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="multimedia"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="multimediaObject"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="paragraph"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="graphic"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="hotspot"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="other"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Super-types:
xs:string < languageIsoCodeAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [a-z]{2,3}

<xs:simpleType name="languageIsoCodeAttType">

Simple Type: layerType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < layerType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'1'|'2'|'3'}
Documentation
Layer of information details

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="layerType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:enumeration value="1"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="2"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="3"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Super-types:

<xs:simpleType name="learnCodeAttType">

      <xs:pattern value="([T|H][A-Z0-9]{2})"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Super-types:

      <xs:pattern value="([A|B|C|D|E])"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Super-types:
xs:string < linkActuateAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:

<xs:simpleType name="linkActuateAttType">

Sub-types:
None

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • value comes from list: {'newPane'|'embedInContext'|'replaceAndReturnToSource'|'replaceAndNoReturn'}

   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:enumeration value="newPane"/>

      <xs:enumeration value="replaceAndReturnToSource"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="replaceAndNoReturn"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: logicalOperatorAndOrType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:NMTOKEN < logicalOperatorType (by restriction) < logicalOperatorAndOrType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'and'|'or'|'not'}
  • value comes from list: {'and'|'or'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="logicalOperatorAndOrType">
   <xs:restriction base="logicalOperatorType">
      <xs:enumeration value="and"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="or"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: logicalOperatorType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:NMTOKEN < logicalOperatorType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
  • logicalOperatorAndOrType (by restriction)

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'and'|'or'|'not'}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="logicalOperatorType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
      <xs:enumeration value="and"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="or"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="not"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: messageCategoryType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:NMTOKEN < messageCategoryType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'alert'|'memo'|'message'|'communication'|'status'|'dispatch'}
Documentation
Type of the message (such Alert, Memo, Message)

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="messageCategoryType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
      <xs:enumeration value="alert"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="memo"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="message"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="communication"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="status"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="dispatch"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: modelIdentCodeAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:string < modelIdentCodeAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: string
  • pattern = [A-Z0-9]{2,14}

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="modelIdentCodeAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
      <xs:pattern value="[A-Z0-9]{2,14}"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Simple Type: priorityLevelType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:NMTOKEN < priorityLevelType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'advisory'|'caution'|'warning'}
Documentation
Level of priority for an electronic message or a annunciationr

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="priorityLevelType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:NMTOKEN">
      <xs:enumeration value="advisory"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="caution"/>
      <xs:enumeration value="warning"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Super-types:

Sub-types:

  • Base XSD Type: string

      <xs:enumeration value="show"/>
   </xs:restriction>

Super-types:

Properties:

  • Base XSD Type: NMTOKEN
  • value comes from list: {'visible'|'hidden'}

<xs:simpleType name="visibilityAttType">

Simple Type: yesOrNoAttType

Type hierarchy:

Super-types:
xs:int < yesOrNoAttType (by restriction)
Sub-types:
None

Properties:

Content
  • Base XSD Type: int
  • pattern = [01]
Documentation

Application Data

TODO : To replace to xs:boolean ? (to be discussed)

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:simpleType name="yesOrNoAttType">
   <xs:restriction base="xs:int">
      <xs:pattern value="[01]"/>
   </xs:restriction>
</xs:simpleType>

Attribute Groups

Attribute Group: behaviorAttGrp

Used By
behaviorElemType

XML Instance Representation 

linkShow="linkShowAttType" [0..1] 
linkActuate="linkActuateAttType" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="behaviorAttGrp">
   <xs:attribute name="linkShow" type="linkShowAttType"/>
   <xs:attribute name="linkActuate" type="linkActuateAttType"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: caseAttrGrp

Used By
caseType

XML Instance Representation 

direct="xs:boolean" [0..1] 
id="idType" [0..1] 
layer="layerType" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="caseAttrGrp">
   <xs:attribute name="direct" type="xs:boolean" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: commonListAttrGrp

Used By
commonListType

XML Instance Representation 

listStyle="xs:NMTOKEN" [0..1] 
associationType="xs:string (value comes from list: {'inclusive'|'exclusive'})" [0..1] 
id="idType" [0..1] 
layer="layerType" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="commonListAttrGrp">
   <xs:attribute name="listStyle" type="xs:NMTOKEN" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="associationType" use="optional">
      <xs:simpleType>
         <xs:restriction base="xs:string">
            <xs:enumeration value="inclusive"/>
            <xs:enumeration value="exclusive"/>
         </xs:restriction>
      </xs:simpleType>
   </xs:attribute>
   <xs:attribute name="id" type="idType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="layer" type="layerType" use="optional"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Attribute Group: dmCodeAttGrp

Used By
dmCodeElemType

XML Instance Representation 

modelIdentCode="modelIdentCodeAttType" [1] 
systemDiffCode="systemDiffCodeAttType" [1] 
systemCode="systemCodeAttType" [1] 
subSystemCode="subSystemCodeAttType" [1] 
subSubSystemCode="subSubSystemCodeAttType" [1] 
assyCode="assyCodeAttType" [1] 
disassyCode="disassyCodeAttType" [1] 
disassyCodeVariant="disassyCodeVariantAttType" [1] 
infoCode="infoCodeAttType" [1] 
infoCodeVariant="infoCodeVariantAttType" [1] 
itemLocationCode="itemLocationCodeAttType" [1] 
learnCode="learnCodeAttType" [0..1] 
learnEventCode="learnEventCodeAttType" [0..1]

Schema Component Representation 

<xs:attributeGroup name="dmCodeAttGrp">
   <xs:attribute name="modelIdentCode" type="modelIdentCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="systemDiffCode" type="systemDiffCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="systemCode" type="systemCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="subSystemCode" type="subSystemCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="subSubSystemCode" type="subSubSystemCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="assyCode" type="assyCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="disassyCode" type="disassyCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="disassyCodeVariant" type="disassyCodeVariantAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="infoCode" type="infoCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="infoCodeVariant" type="infoCodeVariantAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="itemLocationCode" type="itemLocationCodeAttType" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="learnCode" type="learnCodeAttType" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="learnEventCode" type="learnEventCodeAttType" use="optional"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

XML Instance Representation

targetRefTitle="xs:string" [0..1]

   <xs:attribute name="productRefModel" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="productRefSerial" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="productRefName" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="productRefNbr" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="productRefDataFormat" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="productRefDataSpec" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
   <xs:attribute name="targetRefId" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
   <xs:attribute name="targetRefTitle" type="xs:string" use="optional"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

reproductionHeight="xs:string" [0..1]
reproductionScale="xs:string" [0..1]
mimeType="xs:string" [1]

   <xs:attribute name="reproductionHeight" type="xs:string"/>
   <xs:attribute name="reproductionScale" type="xs:string"/>
   <xs:attribute name="mimeType" type="xs:string" use="required"/>
</xs:attributeGroup>

Glossary

Abstract (Applies to complex type definitions and element declarations). An abstract element or complex type cannot used to validate an element instance. If there is a reference to an abstract element, only element declarations that can substitute the abstract element can be used to validate the instance. For references to abstract type definitions, only derived types can be used.

All Model Group Child elements can be provided in any order in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-all.

Choice Model Group Only one from the list of child elements and model groups can be provided in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-choice.

Collapse Whitespace Policy Replace tab, line feed, and carriage return characters with space character (Unicode character 32). Then, collapse contiguous sequences of space characters into single space character, and remove leading and trailing space characters.

Disallowed Substitutions (Applies to element declarations). If substitution is specified, then substitution group members cannot be used in place of the given element declaration to validate element instances. If derivation methods, e.g. extension, restriction, are specified, then the given element declaration will not validate element instances that have types derived from the element declaration's type using the specified derivation methods. Normally, element instances can override their declaration's type by specifying an xsi:type attribute.

Key Constraint Like Uniqueness Constraint, but additionally requires that the specified value(s) must be provided. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.

Key Reference Constraint Ensures that the specified value(s) must match value(s) from a Key Constraint or Uniqueness Constraint. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.

Model Group Groups together element content, specifying the order in which the element content can occur and the number of times the group of element content may be repeated. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#Model_Groups.

Nillable (Applies to element declarations). If an element declaration is nillable, instances can use the xsi:nil attribute. The xsi:nil attribute is the boolean attribute, nil, from the http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance namespace. If an element instance has an xsi:nil attribute set to true, it can be left empty, even though its element declaration may have required content.

Notation A notation is used to identify the format of a piece of data. Values of elements and attributes that are of type, NOTATION, must come from the names of declared notations. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cNotation_Declarations.

Preserve Whitespace Policy Preserve whitespaces exactly as they appear in instances.

Prohibited Derivations (Applies to type definitions). Derivation methods that cannot be used to create sub-types from a given type definition.

Prohibited Substitutions (Applies to complex type definitions). Prevents sub-types that have been derived using the specified derivation methods from validating element instances in place of the given type definition.

Replace Whitespace Policy Replace tab, line feed, and carriage return characters with space character (Unicode character 32).

Sequence Model Group Child elements and model groups must be provided in the specified order in instances. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#element-sequence.

Substitution Group Elements that are members of a substitution group can be used wherever the head element of the substitution group is referenced.

Substitution Group Exclusions (Applies to element declarations). Prohibits element declarations from nominating themselves as being able to substitute a given element declaration, if they have types that are derived from the original element's type using the specified derivation methods.

Target Namespace The target namespace identifies the namespace that components in this schema belongs to. If no target namespace is provided, then the schema components do not belong to any namespace.

Uniqueness Constraint Ensures uniqueness of an element/attribute value, or a combination of values, within a specified scope. See: http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-1/#cIdentity-constraint_Definitions.
